# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud monitoring.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

# ARM Template for Azure Web App, SQL Database & Storage Account with Diagnostic Settings and Monitoring 
parameters:
 - name: appNamePrefix # prefix of the application names (e.g., myapp)
   type: string   
   default: 'myApp'    
 - name: location      # preferred compute location for resources, e.g.: "West Europe" or "North Central US". 
   type: string      
   default: '[resource group name]'       
resources:
- id: rgId             # Resource Group ID (e.g., myResourceGroup)   
  type: Microsoft.Resources/subscriptions/resourceGroups    
  properties:         
    location: "[parameters('location')]"     
  
# Create the resource group and set variables for use in other resources      
variables:        
 - name: rGId            # Resource Group ID (e.g., myResourceGroup)       
   default: '[resource-group id]' 
   
outputs:          
     appNamePrefix:      !ref fullAppName
